# C.A.R.S Collision & Refinish Shop

> Veteran and family owned collision repair and auto body shop in Spring, TX. Expert collision repair, custom paint, paintless dent repair, and spray-in bedliners. Insurance accepted. Free estimates. Serving The Woodlands, Klein, Tomball, Cypress, and North Houston.

## Business

- Name: C.A.R.S Collision & Refinish Shop
- Owner: Tony (veteran, 30+ years collision and auto body experience)
- Address: 2530 Old Louetta Loop #114, Spring, TX 77388
- Phone: 832-885-3055
- Email: carscollisionhouston@gmail.com
- Hours: Mon to Fri 9:00am to 6:00pm, Sat 9:00am to 1:00pm, Sun closed
- Payment: Cash, credit card, insurance, Snap Finance

## Services

- Collision repair (frame straightening, panel replacement, insurance claim assistance, OEM standards)
- Custom paint and refinishing (computerized color matching, full and partial repaints, custom finishes)
- Paintless dent repair (PDR for hail damage, door dings, minor dents without repainting)
- Spray-in bedliners and truck accessories
- Light mechanical repairs (brakes, suspension, A/C, routine maintenance)
- Free estimates and insurance claim assistance

## Service area

- Spring, TX (primary)
- The Woodlands, TX
- Klein, TX
- Tomball, TX
- Cypress, TX
- North Houston / Harris County, TX
